# AUGMANITAI Research Programme — Central Portal

The central landing page for the AUGMANITAI research programme by Andreas Ehstand:
phenomenology of human-AI interaction.

## Author
Andreas Ehstand — AI Researcher
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-3773-7796
- Wikidata Person: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138634675
- Wikidata Programme: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138522830

- PERMANITAI Framework: https://andreasehstandlicenseofclarityloc.github.io/permanitai-framework/
